headline: Allstate App Win Highlights Push For Digital Tools And Customer Value
summary: Allstate's mobile app tied for the top spot in Keynova Group's Q1 2026 Mobile Insurance scorecard. The company is introducing new digital tools aimed at helping customers save on fuel and manage insurance costs. For investors watching NYSE:ALL, this recognition comes with the stock recently closing at $204.1. The shares show multi year total returns of 90.2% over 3 years and 97.9% over 5 years, which provides context as Allstate refines its customer facing technology. The latest app ranking...

headline: Allstate (ALL) Reports $140M February Catastrophe Losses
summary: The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) is one of the 10 Top Stocks Fund Managers Are Loading Up On in 2026. On March 19, 2026, The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) reported estimated catastrophe losses of $140 million for February 2026.
